name: stellar-indexer-go
description: CelerFi Stellar Indexer with TimescaleDB and GraphQL

scripts.db:start: docker run -d --name postgres-demo -e POSTGRES_USER=skipp -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=password -e POSTGRES_DB=stellar_indexer -p 5432:5432 timescale/timescaledb:latest-pg14
scripts.db:init: sleep 5 && psql -h localhost -U skipp -d stellar_indexer -f main.sql && psql -h localhost -U skipp -d stellar_indexer -f token_info.sql && psql -h localhost -U skipp -d stellar_indexer -f liquidity_pools.sql && psql -h localhost -U skipp -d stellar_indexer -f liquidity_actions.sql && psql -h localhost -U skipp -d stellar_indexer -f price_ticks.sql && psql -h localhost -U skipp -d stellar_indexer -f analytics_views.sql && psql -h localhost -U skipp -d stellar_indexer -f transfers.sql && psql -h localhost -U skipp -d stellar_indexer -f seed_assets.sql && psql -h localhost -U skipp -d stellar_indexer -c 'ALTER TABLE price_ticks DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS price_ticks_asset_id_fkey;'
scripts.db:clean: docker stop postgres-demo && docker rm postgres-demo
scripts.inspect:trades: psql -h localhost -U skipp -d stellar_indexer -c 'SELECT block_time, transaction_hash, dex_name, status FROM transaction_models ORDER BY block_time DESC LIMIT 5;'
scripts.inspect:prices: psql -h localhost -U skipp -d stellar_indexer -c 'SELECT ts, asset_id, price_usd, source_id FROM price_ticks ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 5;'
scripts.inspect:tvl: psql -h localhost -U skipp -d stellar_indexer -c 'SELECT pool_address, tvl_usd FROM pool_tvl ORDER BY tvl_usd DESC LIMIT 5;'

author: CelerFi
